title: Football Billionaire Match Attax Edition Family Board Game For Kids and Adults | Ages 6+ | A Trading & Family Strategy Game for 2-6 Players as Seen on Dragon's Den
features: Purchase clubs, buy stadiums, create the perfect team by collecting the best players. You’re the boss - hire and fire managers and negotiate deals to take your club to the top.

Be ready for the transfer window! Swap players with your opposition and even use your own existing trading card collection in Match Attax Football Billionaire, and build a team capable of winning it all.
Avoid relegation: It’s not easy being at the top! Compatible with most other popular trading cards. Football Billionaire is quick to setup and easy to pack away
The perfect football gift for boys, girls, adults, football and non football fans: Suitable for ages 6 to adult. For 2-6 players. As seen on Dragons Den
description: Product Description Experience the thrill of the beautiful game like never before with the revolutionary Topps Match Attax trading card board game by Football Billionaire! Step into the shoes of your favourite football club's manager, strategise your way to victory, and dominate the pitch with a winning team of superstar players. Immerse yourself in the high-stakes action as you battle it out against friends and rivals, collecting and trading the most sought-after player cards to strengthen your squad. Topps Match Attax brings the electrifying world of football to life in the palm of your hand. Unleash your tactical genius, build an unbeatable squad, and conquer the pitch in this exhilarating board game that will leave you breathless with every move. Get ready to be crowned the ultimate Football Billionaire! SIGN AND SELL PLAYERS Experience the highs and lows of being the boss as you buy clubs , play fast and loose in the transfer market and build an all star team . HIRE AND FIRE MANAGERS Put yourself in the hot seat to see if you can beat your competition on the way to becoming the wealthiest and most successful football club owner . COMPETE FOR TROPHIES Challenge family and friends to become the ultimate football billionaire . Official Match Attax Board Game Defeat your opponents on & off the pitch Easy to learn and competitive gameplay Prepare to outsmart your opponents and become the ultimate football billionaire GREAT FOR GROUPS - Up to 6 players AGES 6+ Loved by All "It's like Monopoly but with trading cards. Definitely worth buying!!" "Regardless of whether you are a football fan or not, the competitiveness gets you hooked and makes you want play for season after season." "Highly recommend regardless if you are footie fan or not. great fun for everyone." "It has been become the board game of choice on a Sunday afternoon." HAVE YOU GOT WHAT IT TAKES TO BE THE BEST?
